violations.text: Food items prepared in advance were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Dessert items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The cutting board on the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2025
The handle on the two door reach in was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves of the prep unit reach in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the dough prep area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2025

The presence of insects are not controlled as evidenced by flies at the 3 bay sink area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control reports need to sent to inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the floor, walls, and ceiling at the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back preparation area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

Cooked pasta, meatballs, chicken, deli meats and cheeses observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023

The presence of insects are not controlled as evidenced by flies at the 3 bay sink area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of two refrigeration units, preparation units, walk-in refrigeration unit floor and shelves, side of fryer, mixer, table for can opener and stove were observed with an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023

The floors at the preparation area and next to fryer have an accumulation of soil residue, oil and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
The floor beneath drying storage area and under 3 bay sink area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back preparation area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
